title: Connecting the wrong interface to a port does not cause an error

features.name: interface port with parameterized interface
features.description: Code should include a module with an interface port where the interface is parameterized
features.snippet:
interface ifc #(int W=8)(); logic [W-1:0] data; endinterface
module sub(output ifc#(.W(16)) intf); endmodule
module top(); ifc#(.W(8)) foo(); sub s(intf); endmodule

features.name: mismatched interface connection to port
features.description: Code should include a module instantiating an interface of one parameter value and connecting it to a port expecting a different parameter value
features.snippet:
interface ifc #(int W=8)(); logic [W-1:0] data; endinterface
module sub(output ifc#(.W(16)) intf); endmodule
module top(); ifc#(.W(8)) foo(); sub s(intf); endmodule
